NanoBootJava Micro-Framework

A lightweight Spring Boot alternative with dependency injection, web support, and more

Get Started
View on GitHub

⚡ Lightweight

Minimal overhead compared to Spring Boot with similar functionality

🏗️ Modular Architecture

Pick and choose only the components you need for your application

🔧 Annotation Driven

Familiar Spring-style annotations for development

🚀 Quick Setup

Command line tool to generate complete projects instantly

🌐 Full Stack Ready

Web, data access, WebSocket, and more in one framework

📦 Standard Compliant

Follows familiar Java development patterns and conventions
